title: Official national context
text: Low official enterprise AI use and lagging SME digitalisation.

title: Engaged survey evidence
text: The survey segment reports higher AI use and a larger project pipeline than the official national benchmark.

title: Responsible-AI governance pressure
text: AI Act, AI-literacy expectations and ethical regulation make capability demands more explicit.

title: Capacity constraints
text: Cost, technical expertise, data maturity and change-management limits remain dominant barriers.

title: Socio-technical readiness
text: Training, routines, leadership, trust and human oversight condition whether experimentation becomes deployment.

title: Policy and ecosystem support
text: Funding, guidance and capability infrastructure are perceived as part of the adoption environment.

title: Capability pressure under responsible-AI governance
text: The central tension is conversion: awareness and experimentation must become capability-backed and regulation-aware deployment.
